lastItems.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
lastItems.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.

lastItems.title: Why Video Agent models are next — Ethan He, xAI Grok Imagine
lastItems.summary: Inside xAI: Building Grok Imagine in 3 Months, Videogen vs World Models, and why Grok Imagine is so underrated. For the first time, we do a deep dive with the guy who led it!

lastItems.title: Improved performance and model support with GGUF
lastItems.summary: Ollama 0.30 is now available with improved performance and GGUF model compatibility through llama.cpp. This augments Ollama's MLX engine on Apple silicon, bringing support to more models on a wider range of hardware.
